message:
fix: unbuffered stdout, chat list progress, and pagination test

- Add setbuf(stdout, nil) so output appears immediately when not on a TTY
- Add progress counter during chat list fetch (important with 50k+ chats)
- Fix pagination test to not assert on limit (Beeper API ignores it)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
